Content:
# Contributors |**Sl no.**|**Name**|**Github**|**Linkedin**| |-|-|-|-| |1|Ananth M Athreya|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya)|[🔗](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ananth-m-athreya-963262287/)| |2|Aditi Shastri|[🔗](https://github.com/AditiShastri)|-| |3|Sathish Dath|[🔗](https://github.com/dath2006)|-| |4|Shreesha|[🔗](https://github.com/shreesha84)|-| |5|Amith Gowda M|[🔗](https://github.com/amithgowda-m)|-| # You can contribute ## What can you contribute? - Any notes and question papers related to __first year courses__ of the 2022 scheme of RVCE can be contributed. - The file size should not exceed 100 MB. If you want to add any textbook, then add only those chapters relevant to the course units must be added. ## How to contribute? - If you are familiar with using GitHub: + If you want to add materials to a course that is not there on this repo, create a folder and send a push request. + Otherwise, just add files to the course folder and send a push request. - If you are not familiar with using GitHub, then please refer [instruction manual](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/HowToContribute) - If you don't want to use GitHub, then please fill this form [Form link](https://forms.gle/GR2N4dKWF2NwvwiK8) __You will get credits.__ # Introduction This repository contains the resources of the following 1st year courses in the 2022 scheme of RV College of Engineering # Courses in this repository ## Applied Science Courses |**Sl no.**|**Course Name**|**Course code**|**Github**|**Additional resources**| |-|-|-|-|:-:| |1|Fundamentals of Linear Algebra, Calculus & Statistics|MAT211CT|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/1st_sem/Mathematics)|
Linear Algebra playlist by Department of Mathematics, RVCE[🔗](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlzzm7LKQHC1zkIXcGlshq9e5C0UL7gvd&si=l-GXzlL91hD-6xHC)
First Year Maths playlist by Department of Mathematics[🔗](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlzzm7LKQHC3foeKqiqL24TAOFcdpWPWt&si=FCfN94JN0_vrNdeN)
| |2|Number Theory, Vector Calculus & Computational Methods|MAT221CT|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/2nd%20sem/Maths(22MA21C))|
First Year Maths playlist by Department of Mathematics[🔗](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlzzm7LKQHC3foeKqiqL24TAOFcdpWPWt&si=FCfN94JN0_vrNdeN)
| |3|Quantum Physics for Engineers|PHY221CI|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/2nd%20sem/Physics(22PH22C))|**-**| |4|Chemistry of Smart Materials & Devices|CHY211AI|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/1st_sem/Chemistry)|**-**| ## Professional Core Courses |**Sl no.**|**Course Name**|**Course code**|**Github**| |-|-|-|-| |1|Principles of Programming Using C|CS222AI|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/2nd%20sem/Programming%20in%20C(22CS23))| |2|Computer Aided Engineering Graphics|ME112GL/ME122GL|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/1st_sem/CAED)| ## Engineering Science Courses |**Sl no.**|**Course Name**|**Course code**|**Github**| |-|-|-|-| |1|Elements of Civil Engineering|CV113ATB/CV123ATB|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/Engineering%20Science%20courses(ESC)/Civil%20ESC)|
Translation:
# 기여자 |**번호**|**이름**|**깃허브**|**링크드인**| |-|-|-|-| |1|Ananth M Athreya|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya)|[🔗](https://www.linkedin.com/in/ananth-m-athreya-963262287/)| |2|Aditi Shastri|[🔗](https://github.com/AditiShastri)|-| |3|Sathish Dath|[🔗](https://github.com/dath2006)|-| |4|Shreesha|[🔗](https://github.com/shreesha84)|-| |5|Amith Gowda M|[🔗](https://github.com/amithgowda-m)|-| # 기여할 수 있습니다 ## 무엇을 기여할 수 있나요? - RVCE 2022 학제의 __1학년 과목__ 관련 노트 및 기출문제를 기여할 수 있습니다. - 파일 크기는 100MB를 초과하지 않아야 합니다. 교재를 추가하려면, 해당 과목 단원과 관련된 챕터만 추가해야 합니다. ## 어떻게 기여하나요? - GitHub 사용에 익숙하다면: + 이 저장소에 없는 과목에 자료를 추가하려면, 폴더를 생성하고 푸시 요청을 보내세요. + 그렇지 않으면, 과목 폴더에 파일을 추가하고 푸시 요청을 보내세요. - GitHub 사용이 익숙하지 않다면, [설명서](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/HowToContribute)를 참고하세요. - GitHub 사용을 원하지 않는다면, 이 양식을 작성하세요 [양식 링크](https://forms.gle/GR2N4dKWF2NwvwiK8) __기여에 대한 크레딧을 받습니다.__ # 소개 이 저장소는 RV 공과대학 2022 학제의 다음 1학년 과목 자료를 포함합니다. # 이 저장소의 과목들 ## 응용과학 과목 |**번호**|**과목명**|**과목 코드**|**깃허브**|**추가 자료**| |-|-|-|-|:-:| |1|선형대수학, 미적분학 및 통계학 기초|MAT211CT|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/1st_sem/Mathematics)|
RVCE 수학과의 선형대수학 재생목록[🔗](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlzzm7LKQHC1zkIXcGlshq9e5C0UL7gvd&si=l-GXzlL91hD-6xHC)
수학과 1학년 수학 재생목록[🔗](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlzzm7LKQHC3foeKqiqL24TAOFcdpWPWt&si=FCfN94JN0_vrNdeN)
| |2|정수론, 벡터 미적분 및 계산 방법|MAT221CT|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/2nd%20sem/Maths(22MA21C))|
수학과 1학년 수학 재생목록[🔗](https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLlzzm7LKQHC3foeKqiqL24TAOFcdpWPWt&si=FCfN94JN0_vrNdeN)
| |3|공학자를 위한 양자 물리학|PHY221CI|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/2nd%20sem/Physics(22PH22C))|**-**| |4|스마트 재료 및 장치의 화학|CHY211AI|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/1st_sem/Chemistry)|**-**| ## 전문 핵심 과목 |**번호**|**과목명**|**과목 코드**|**깃허브**| |-|-|-|-| |1|C 프로그래밍 원리|CS222AI|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/2nd%20sem/Programming%20in%20C(22CS23))| |2|컴퓨터 지원 공학 그래픽|ME112GL/ME122GL|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/1st_sem/CAED)| ## 공학 과학 과목 |**번호**|**과목명**|**과목 코드**|**깃허브**| |-|-|-|-| |1|토목공학 개론|CV113ATB/CV123ATB|[🔗](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/Engineering%20Science%20courses(ESC)/Civil%20ESC)|

## BS Grewal Textbook
This repository also contains a few selected chapters for all the 1st year Math courses, of the textbook [Higher Engineering Mathematics](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/BS%20Grewal%20Math%20textbook) by Dr. BS Grewal. Those chapters are:
1) Linear Algebra
2) Differential Calculus
3) Partial Differentiation
4) Multiple Integrals
5) Vector Calculus
6) Linear DE
7) Applications of LDE
8) PDE
9) Applications of PDE
10) Laplace transforms
11) Statistical Methods
12) Numerical Methods
13) Finite differences and interpolation
14) Numerical differentiation and integration
15) Numerical solution of ODE
# See more

## BS 그류월 교재
이 저장소에는 Dr. BS Grewal의 교재 [고등 공학 수학](https://github.com/AnanthMAthreya/1st-year-resources-2022-scheme-rvce/tree/main/BS%20Grewal%20Math%20textbook)의 1학년 수학 과목별 일부 선정된 챕터들도 포함되어 있습니다. 해당 챕터들은 다음과 같습니다:
1) 선형대수학
2) 미분학
3) 편미분
4) 다중적분
5) 벡터 미적분학
6) 선형 미분방정식
7) 선형 미분방정식 응용
8) 편미분방정식
9) 편미분방정식 응용
10) 라플라스 변환
11) 통계 방법
12) 수치 해석
13) 유한 차분 및 보간법
14) 수치 미분 및 적분
15) 상미분방정식의 수치해법
# 더 보기
